markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Sophie Cunningham records 3+ three pointers in the Atlanta at Indiana women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the Atlanta at Indiana women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026. Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Nick Kurtz is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Nick Kurtz starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
